jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Vedantu
jsonLd.description:
Vedantu, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
